author: doll-agent
content: Changed FittedGaussianMixture::bic / aic signatures from  to sklearn-faithful  (and same for aic). Both now compute the per-sample log-likelihood from X via score_samples then add the appropriate complexity penalty. Replaced the old  shortcut (which assumed X was the training data) so the new signature works on held-out data too. Also added the same two methods to FittedBayesianGaussianMixture using its own n_free_params() helper. Old API removed (no callers left).
